label: professional_details
value: Registered nurse with an advanced wound care certification and recently completed an advanced certification course in IV therapy, eager to integrate new skills into daily responsibilities, now pursuing a BSN full-time with a scholarship, involved in a community health initiative requiring flexible hours, attended a regional nursing conference and enjoyed workshops on advanced patient care, interested in further hands-on learning experiences and upcoming workshops/seminars on patient care techniques. Leverages volunteer experience in professional development by highlighting skills such as communication, empathy, leadership, cultural competency, problem-solving, and networking. Interested in tools and equipment for IV therapy, including catheters, needles, IV pumps, infusion devices, tubing, accessories, sterile techniques, and monitoring equipment. Seeks to apply skills in critical care, long-term IV therapy, pediatric care, complex medication regimens, and emergency situations. Prefers self-study materials for BSN coursework due to convenience and flexibility. Selected for a case management training program focusing on patient safety and communication strategies, considering a career shift towards becoming a case manager.

label: health_and_wellness_preferences
value: Interested in specific techniques and practices within meditation apps for stress relief in a high-stress environment like healthcare, including guided meditations, body scans, visualization, deep breathing, and quick SOS exercises.

label: dietary_preferences
value: Switched from a strict vegetarian diet to a flexitarian one, emphasizing plant-based foods but now includes lean meats and fish.

label: miscellaneous_information
value: Interested in recent articles and books on medical technology and patient stories

label: activity_and_service_preferences
value: Interested in quick and easy meal prep ideas that align with the flexitarian diet to streamline meal preparation without sacrificing nutritional value.

label: important_personal_details
value: Hospital recently started offering fixed daytime shifts, providing more flexibility during evenings and weekends; looking to balance work and personal life better

label: plans_and_intentions
value: Joined a local healthcare-related volunteer group that provides free health screenings and educational workshops in underserved communities, aiming to make the most out of the volunteer experience by understanding community needs, engaging actively, building relationships, documenting experiences, reflecting on learning, seeking feedback, integrating into resume and LinkedIn, networking, continuing education, managing time effectively, and communicating with stakeholders. Selected for a case management training program and exploring ways to prepare for a potential career shift towards becoming a case manager.
